name: Parallax Orchard
description: Orbit a 3D orchard and physically harvest only fruit whose stem remains joined to wood in depth.
natural_language: Orbit the impossible orchard. Pluck only fruit whose stem is joined to wood in depth.

metadata.notes: Analytic parallax rebuild: all branch contacts coincide head-on, multiple orbit sectors are required, and fruit must be dragged into a physical basket. Server and task verifier independently replay camera and harvest geometry.
